tasks.description: Review the text-based progress integration in neos-installer-partition.sh.
Verify that Calamares branding correctly uses NeOS blue (#0078D4).
Ensure text-based progress indicators and terminal formatting follow UX standards.
Ensure error messages logged when dependencies are missing are clear. Review graphical update notifier error surfaces for clarity.
Ensure that error messaging regarding invalid device inputs maintains the structured, multi-line formatting standards.
Ensure the error message logged when snapper is missing is clear, informative, and provides actionable context.
Ensure the new architecture section utilizes clear hierarchy, bullet points, and visual indicators like emojis to aid comprehension.
Ensure markdown formatting is intact for checklist updates.
Review the CI scanning log output formatting and UX.
Ensure the format of the logged error message is clear and includes actionable steps
